---
title: '2014/01/25 Journal Sat'
date: '2014-01-25T13:37:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '304920404000294854'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140125-journal-sat.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
<div>
<a href="https://www.bible.com/users/darrellwolfe/reading-plans/28-joseph-prince?day=74&amp;user_id=darrellwolfe&amp;version=1" target="_blank">Galations 3</a></div>
<span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;">13</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;">Christ hath redeemed us from the curse of the law, being made a curse for us: for it is written, Cursed is every one that hangeth on a tree:</span><br />
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
I'm thankful for waking up at all this morning. Stayed up to late last night.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
<br />
Feeling very much like I don't want to go to work today. Looking forward to being self employed, employed by God?<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
I just upgraded my sites look last night. Found out there were templates for Blogger! Very Excited!<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
